# Frontend React code analysis (2026-03-10 09:56Z)

_**User**_

Thoroughly explore the frontend React code in this call-center application. Read ALL files in:
- `src/` directory root (App.jsx, main.jsx, etc.)
- `src/pages/` (all .jsx and .css files)
- `src/components/` (all files)
- `src/context/` (all files)
- `vite.config.js`
- `package.json`

For each file, provide:
1. Full file path and line count
2. Component structure and state management
3. UI/UX observations
4. Code quality issues: duplicate logic, unused imports, performance problems
5. Responsiveness and accessibility concerns
6. CSS analysis for each page

Be very thorough - read every file completely. Return a detailed analysis of each frontend file.
